texto: China, frankly, can be an opportunity for Africa based on the huge infrastructure deficit on the continent, but what needs to happen is that governments and citizens have to build internal ownership of the need of good governance, transparency, accountability, for respect for the environment.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Obiageli Ezekwesili sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “China, frankly, can be an opportunity for Africa based on the huge infrastructure deficit on the …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, good, opportunity, útil em momentos de opportunity.
